[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: One sentence summarizing the whole image: A screenshot shows a web page with a video thumbnail of a woman covering part of her mouth, with a blue header containing the text “XNXx.com” and other site wording.

Main Subject: The main focus is a video thumbnail showing a person with dark hair facing the camera while covering her mouth and lower face with her hand, with her eyes and eyebrows visible above her hand.

Setting: The scene appears to be indoors or a close-up setting within the video thumbnail, displayed as part of a webpage screenshot with a dark blue top bar and interface elements.

Visual Details: The image has a thick dark blue header across the top. Centered near the top is large white text reading “XNXx.com,” and below it, smaller white text reads “Watch Long Fish Porn Videos for FREE.” In the thumbnail area, the background behind the person is light blue and beige with indoor-looking surfaces. The person’s face is tan with dark hair framing the sides of the head; her hand is raised to cover her mouth, and she appears to be looking toward the camera. At the bottom left of the thumbnail area there is white text in Indonesian-style script and a time label, while the bottom right shows a number and a percentage with a small icon.

Visible Text: XNXx.com  
Watch Long Fish Porn Videos for FREE  
di entot malah ketawa  
3min  
232.4k  
87%

Practical Summary: The image shows a video thumbnail on a porn-video style webpage with a prominent dark blue header. It features a close-up of a woman covering her mouth with her hand, plus on-screen text and viewing metrics at the bottom.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
